acceptance_criteria.description: worldeval-agent/0.1.0 provides immutable schemas, fixtures, validators, version metadata, and a protocol lock for all required onboarding and action contracts.
Environment initialization is materialized from an authored manifest, episode objective, and capability profile, then hash-acknowledged before scored actions.
Objects have stable episode identities and explicit coordinate frames, and action primitives declare preconditions, cancellation, receipts, and forbidden game authority.

compatibility: Add the protocol without changing released llm-controller, Duel, or embodiment contracts.
migration: New environments opt in explicitly through declared profiles.
privacy: Initialization and observations contain only participant-visible capabilities and state.
rollback: Consumers can remain on existing protocols while this additive package is removed or revised.

in: Object, action, observation, decision, receipt, skill, and replay contracts

summary: Create the versioned, environment-neutral contract that tells an agent what world it controls and which primitive actions it may request.
title: Game onboarding, object, action, and objective contracts
